prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 电子信息/通信类专业2024年社会热度为"高热推荐"，计算机类为"推荐"，电气 工程及其自动化为"高热推荐"，与电子科技大学王牌专业高度匹配，报考热度持续高涨。内蒙古2026年高考总人数约154000人，较2025年总人数116360人大幅增长约32.3%；按历 史比例估算物理类考生约110800人，较2025年83716人增长约32.3%，考生规模显著扩大，竞争加剧。；电子科技大学位于四川成都 ，非内蒙古本地高校，在内蒙古招生占比极小（2025年约1.34%），属于跨省招生，受地域偏好影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次1273名、2026年扩招1人（扩幅1. 6%）、内蒙古物理类考生大幅增长约32.3%以及电子/通信/计算机类专业持续高热等因素，扩招小幅缓解竞争但考生大幅增加是主要推高位次的力量。预测2026年最低位次约1300 名，区间1105–1495名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for the Science Group (including Physics Category) were approximately 1590 → 5306 → 2862 → 1338 → 1273. In 2022, due to a gap effect, the ranking significantly dropped to 5306, then gradually recovered in subsequent years, returning to 1338 in 2024 and further moving forward to 1273 in 2025, showing a continuous forward trend in the last two years, with a baseline ranking of about 1273 in 2025. The university's enrollment plan for the Science Group in Inner Mongolia: 58 in 2021, 57 in 2022, 57 in 2023, 56 in 2024, 62 in 2025 (Physics Category), and 63 in 2026. Compared to 2025, there is an increase of 1 student in 2026, an expansion of about 1.6%, which slightly eases competition but has limited impact.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: University of Electronic Science and Technology of China is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it ranks 33rd on the main list, with stable rankings in the 28–33 range in recent years, belonging to the top-tier science and engineering universities in China. In 2026, the university's reputation evaluation is slightly negative, mainly involving school management responses and teacher ethics incidents, but overall attention is moderate. On Douyin, it ranks 33rd in popularity (relatively hot), with medium-to-high short video exposure, and no obvious negative public opinion outbreak. In 2022, there was a low-attention gap signal, but rankings have since recovered and moved forward. Disciplines: Electronic Science and Technology A+, Information and Communication Engineering A+, Computer Science and Technology A, Instrument Science and Technology A-, Optical Engineering A-, Management Science and Engineering A-. The university has top-tier disciplinary strength in the field of electronic information, making it highly attractive to science candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2024, the social popularity of Electronic Information/Communication majors is 'highly recommended', Computer majors are 'recommended', and Electrical Engineering and Automation is 'highly recommended', highly matching the flagship majors of University of Electronic Science and Technology of China, with continuously high application enthusiasm. In 2026, the total number of college entrance exam takers in Inner Mongolia is about 154,000, a significant increase of about 32.3% compared to 116,360 in 2025. Estimated by historical proportion, the number of Physics Category candidates is about 110,800, an increase of about 32.3% from 83,716 in 2025, with a notable expansion in candidate scale and intensified competition. University of Electronic Science and Technology of China is located in Chengdu, Sichuan, not a local university in Inner Mongolia, and its enrollment proportion in Inner Mongolia is very small (about 1.34% in 2025), belonging to cross-provincial enrollment, with limited impact from regional preferences.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 1273, the 2026 enrollment expansion of 1 student (expansion rate 1.6%), the significant increase of about 32.3% in Inner Mongolia Physics Category candidates, and the sustained high popularity of Electronic/Communication/Computer majors, the expansion slightly eases competition, but the substantial increase in candidates is the main force pushing rankings higher. The predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is about 1300, with a range of 1105–1495.

- Computer Class.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 1105–1495, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main direction, use Tier 1 flagship majors as a sprint, and Tier 3 majors as a safety net. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (within 1105), you can focus on sprinting for Integrated Circuit Design and Integrated Systems, Electronic Information Class (Information and Communication) and other A+ discipline majors. If your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (around 1495), you should mainly choose Tier 3 majors to ensure admission.

In 2025, it was significantly reduced to 5, and the 2026 plan remains unchanged, with no further reduction.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: University of Electronic Science and Technology of China is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. It ranks 33rd in the 2026 Soft Science Chinese University Rankings, making it a top domestic science and engineering university, but liberal arts are not its strength. In 2026, the university's reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly involving science and engineering related incidents. Its Douyin popularity ranks 33rd (relatively hot), with moderate overall attention. The university's advantageous disciplines are concentrated in electronic information, computer science, and other engineering fields. Its liberal arts majors (Social Science Experimental Class, Foreign Languages and Literature) lack A-level discipline evaluations, so their academic appeal is relatively limited.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2026, the total number of Gaokao examinees in Inner Mongolia is about 154,000, a significant increase of about 32.3% compared to 2025. Based on historical proportions, it is estimated that there are about 43,200 history category examinees, an increase of about 32.3% from 32,644 in 2025, indicating a notable expansion in the examinee pool and intensified competition. Its enrollment proportion in Inner Mongolia is extremely small, with only 5 liberal arts students, representing a small cross-province enrollment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 724, the unchanged 2026 enrollment plan (5 students), the significant increase of about 32.3% in history category examinees in Inner Mongolia, and the relatively weak academic strength of liberal arts majors at University of Electronic Science and Technology of China, the substantial increase in examinees is the main factor pushing up the ranking, while the unchanged plan cannot alleviate competitive pressure.
